title.description: Poem title (Arabic). Used as the H1, page title, OG/JSON-LD name.

shortName.description: Optional short name for the PWA (defaults to title).

layout.description: single = one page (a Table of Contents appears for multi-section poems). paged = an index page + one page per ## chapter, with prev/next nav — use this for long works (alfiyyas).

domain.description: Bare custom domain host (no https://), e.g. "poem.example.com". Becomes CNAME + canonical URL.

manifestDescription.description: Optional PWA manifest description (defaults to description).

signatureLine.description: Free-text date/place line shown under the first section's signature.

splashColor.description: PWA splash background. Match your icon.

resources.description: Optional links. Each rendered as a card + a scroll button; omit to hide.

whatsapp.description: true = auto share text from title/author/url; or a custom string.

pdf.description: PDF filename placed in content/ (copied to the site root).

ga4.description: GA4 measurement id, e.g. G-XXXXXXX. Omit to ship zero analytics.

card.description: 1200x630 JPG in content/, used as og:image. If omitted, the 512 icon is used.

labels.description: Optional overrides for Arabic UI strings (سماع، إرسال، PDF، ويب …).
